analysis.name: Bedrock
analysis.summary: BR代币近期因BTCFi叙事、PoSL机制推出及多家CEX上线而上涨，但链上存在同名meme币，需注意区分。基本面有实际应用，但估值较高，流通量仅27.7%，存在解锁风险。

recommendation.invalidation: 价格跌破0.12美元或出现大额解锁公告

catalysts: 多家CEX（MEXC、Bitget等）上线现货及合约
Airdrop checker上线引发社区关注

latestNews.title: Bedrock Introduces Proof of Staking Liquidity (PoSL) and Launches BR Airdrop Checker
latestNews.reason: PoSL是创新机制，Airdrop checker吸引用户参与，增加代币需求

latestNews.title: MEXC Introduces Bedrock (BR) Listing with Spot & Futures
latestNews.reason: 新CEX上线带来流动性和新买家

latestNews.title: BR (Bedrock) experiences 75.0% volatility in 24 hours: surge and pullback driven by sharp increases in trading volume and open interest
latestNews.reason: 高波动说明市场情绪热烈但风险大

fundamentals: Bedrock是多链流动性质押协议，支持BTC、ETH等资产
BR是治理代币，通过锁定为veBR获得投票权
总供应量10亿，流通2.77亿（27.7%），FDV约1.51亿美元
项目有实际TVL和收入，但具体数据未提供
marketRead: 24小时涨幅6.2%，7日涨幅9.6%，30日涨幅31%，处于上升趋势
24小时成交量1014万美元，相对市值4190万美元，换手率较高
链上存在同名BR/SOL meme币（pumpfun），市值仅468美元，注意区分
主网BR代币在CEX交易，链上流动性数据缺失
risks: 总供应量10亿，流通仅27.7%，未来解锁压力大
DeFi协议风险（智能合约漏洞、黑客攻击）
BTCFi赛道竞争激烈，Bedrock并非龙头
sourceNotes: 链上数据来自pumpfun，可能不是主网BR代币，需谨慎
新闻来源多为聚合器，时效性一般
未提供项目团队、融资等详细信息

profile.name: Bedrock
profile.description: Bedrock DAO is a governance framework for managing decisions within the Bedrock ecosystem. It enables BR token holders to participate in governance by converting BR into veBR, a voting escrow token. Governance decisions include protocol parameters, incentive structures, and liquidity allocation. The governance system is based on veBR, which is obtained by locking BR tokens at a 1:1 ratio. The longer the lock duration, the greater the voting power. veBR holders vote on governance proposals, including gauge allocations that determine incentive distribution across liquidity pools.
